_meta.description: RefTriage data schemas — all JSON structures and database definitions for MVP

1_canonical_output_schema._description: The single target schema both extraction paths produce. Every downstream component (summarization, UI, PDF, corrections) references this structure. Fields are nullable unless marked required.

source_documents.format: ccda_xml | fhir_json | pdf_typed | pdf_scanned | pdf_handwritten | plain_text

signals.source_field: string — JSON path to the triggering data

suggested_search_terms: string — terms a coordinator could use to look up trials

2_ccd_intermediate_schema._description: Raw parsed output from the CCD/CCDA XML parser BEFORE recency filtering. Contains all data from the document organized by section. This is the input to the recency filter, which then produces a subset that maps to the canonical schema.

conditions_all.is_clinical: boolean — false for employment, education, medication review entries

3_recency_filter_config._description: Configuration for the recency filter that transforms CCD intermediate schema into the canonical schema's clinical_data section. Defines time windows, tier classification rules, deduplication logic, and always-surface criteria.
tier_1_current_rules: Medications with no stop_date or stop_date > now
Most recent complete vital signs set

filter_out_snomed_codes.266919005: Never smoked (goes to social_history, not problem_list)

deduplication_rules.medications: Collapse consecutive entries with same drug name + dose into single entry with first_prescribed = earliest start_date. Keep only distinct drug+dose combinations.
deduplication_rules.conditions: Deduplicate by SNOMED code. If same condition appears multiple times, keep only the instance with the earliest onset_date and latest resolution_date (or no resolution if any instance is active).
deduplication_rules.vitals: Group by date. Keep only the most recent complete set for display. For trending, keep the last N sets as configured in vitals_trend_sets.
deduplication_rules.labs: For recurring panel types (same LOINC), keep only the most recent result. If a value changed >20% from the prior result, include the prior value in prior_value field for trending context.
deduplication_rules.encounters: No dedup needed — just filter by recency window.
deduplication_rules.procedures: Filter out non-surgical assessments and screenings (route screening results to functional_status instead). Keep actual procedures and surgeries regardless of date.

4_correction_record_schema._description: Captured automatically when a coordinator edits any field in the review UI. No extra modal or confirmation — silent capture on save.
4_correction_record_schema.field_path: string — dot-notation JSON path, e.g. 'clinical_data.medications.active[0].dose' or 'triage.urgency'
4_correction_record_schema.original_value: any — the value before the edit
4_correction_record_schema.corrected_value: any — the value after the edit
4_correction_record_schema.corrected_by: uuid | null — FK to users table (post-MVP)

5_patient_trajectory_schema._description: De-identified record created when a referral is finalized. No PHI — only hashed identifier and categorical clinical data. This is the primary dataset for acquisition value.
5_patient_trajectory_schema.referral_reason_category: string — normalized category, not free text
5_patient_trajectory_schema.correction_count: int — number of corrections made during review
corrected_fields: string — list of field_paths that were corrected
5_patient_trajectory_schema.outcome: seen | no_show | redirected | cancelled | null — populated later

6_summary_output_schema._description: The JSON structure returned by the summarization + triage LLM call. This is what the LLM produces from the canonical schema, NOT what the coordinator sees directly (the UI renders both the canonical data and this summary).
6_summary_output_schema.one_line_summary: string — single sentence capturing the essence of this referral
6_summary_output_schema.summary_narrative: string — 2-4 paragraph clinical summary following the structure: (1) patient snapshot + referral reason, (2) relevant clinical context, (3) significant history if applicable, (4) gaps and next steps

action_items: string — things the coordinator should do next

missing_information: string — clinically important data not found

7_database_ddl._description: PostgreSQL table definitions. Copy this SQL directly to initialize the database.
7_database_ddl.sql:
-- RefTriage Database Schema

CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "pgcrypto";

CREATE TABLE source_documents (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    storage_key TEXT NOT NULL,
    original_filename TEXT,
    mime_type TEXT,
    file_size_bytes BIGINT,
    document_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (document_format IN ('ccda_xml', 'fhir_json', 'pdf_typed', 'pdf_scanned', 'pdf_handwritten', 'plain_text')),
    extraction_path TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (extraction_path IN ('structured_parse', 'llm_extraction')),
    ocr_text TEXT,
    ocr_confidence_mean FLOAT,
    sections_found TEXT[],
    uploaded_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
    uploaded_by UUID
);

CREATE TABLE referrals (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    source_document_ids UUID[] NOT NULL,
    extracted_data JSONB NOT NULL,
    summary_narrative TEXT,
    one_line_summary TEXT,
    triage_urgency TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (triage_urgency IN ('urgent', 'semi_urgent', 'routine', 'needs_clarification', 'inappropriate')),
    triage_confidence FLOAT NOT NULL,
    triage_reasoning TEXT,
    triage_red_flags TEXT[],
    triage_missing_info TEXT[],
    triage_action_items TEXT[],
    clinical_trial_flagged BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
    clinical_trial_signals JSONB,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending_review' CHECK (status IN ('processing', 'pending_review', 'reviewed', 'finalized', 'archived')),
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
    reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    reviewed_by UUID,
    finalized_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    summary_pdf_key TEXT
);

CREATE TABLE corrections (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    referral_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES referrals(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    field_path TEXT NOT NULL,
    original_value JSONB,
    corrected_value JSONB,
    correction_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (correction_type IN ('value_change', 'field_added', 'field_removed', 'triage_override')),
    corrected_by UUID,
    corrected_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
    correction_reason TEXT
);

CREATE TABLE patient_trajectories (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    patient_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
    referral_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES referrals(id),
    encounter_date DATE,
    referring_specialty TEXT,
    receiving_specialty TEXT,
    triage_urgency TEXT,
    triage_confidence FLOAT,
    referral_reason_category TEXT,
    primary_diagnosis_snomed TEXT,
    active_condition_count INT,
    active_medication_count INT,
    has_red_flags BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
    clinical_trial_flagged BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
    trial_signal_types TEXT[],
    correction_count INT DEFAULT 0,
    corrected_fields TEXT[],
    outcome TEXT CHECK (outcome IN ('seen', 'no_show', 'redirected', 'cancelled') OR outcome IS NULL),
    days_to_appointment INT,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE audit_log (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    action TEXT NOT NULL,
    resource_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    resource_id UUID NOT NULL,
    user_id UUID,
    ip_address INET,
    user_agent TEXT,
    details JSONB,
    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- Indexes
CREATE INDEX idx_referrals_status ON referrals(status);
CREATE INDEX idx_referrals_triage ON referrals(triage_urgency);
CREATE INDEX idx_referrals_created ON referrals(created_at);
CREATE INDEX idx_referrals_trial ON referrals(clinical_trial_flagged) WHERE clinical_trial_flagged = true;
CREATE INDEX idx_corrections_referral ON corrections(referral_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_trajectories_patient ON patient_trajectories(patient_hash);
CREATE INDEX idx_trajectories_specialty ON patient_trajectories(receiving_specialty);
CREATE INDEX idx_trajectories_trial ON patient_trajectories(clinical_trial_flagged) WHERE clinical_trial_flagged = true;
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_resource ON audit_log(resource_type, resource_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_audit_created ON audit_log(created_at);
